title: Cat's in the Cradle
why_this_song: Cat's in the Cradle by Harry Chapin (1974) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You know I'm gonna be like you""
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I don't know when, but we'll get together then"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I don't know when, but we'll get together then"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You know we'll have a good time then"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "My child arrived just the other day"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "we'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "we'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: My child arrived just the other day
And said, "I'm gonna be like him, yeah
I've long since retired, my son's moved away

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: He learned to walk while I was away
You know we'll have a good time then
I called him up just the other day

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Cat's in the Cradle" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Cat's in the Cradle" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
